name: Never Fail Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix powdered sugar and cocoa together in a mixing bowl.
2. Add butter to the mixture, breaking it into 4 or 5 pieces.
3. Pour milk into the mixture.
4. Microwave on HIGH for 2-3 minutes, or until bubbly. Stir lightly.
5. Thoroughly stir in chopped nuts and vanilla extract so the nuts are evenly distributed.
6. Spread the fudge evenly into a (10x8-inch) dish.
7. Refrigerate for 1 hour before cutting into squares.
